ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vaccination_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination statistic */,
  "dhb" TEXT /* District Health Board of residence */,
  "ethnic_group" TEXT /* Ethnic group of the population */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "vaccination_campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination campaign */,
  "first_dose_administered" INTEGER /* Number of first doses administered */,
  "second_dose_administered" INTEGER /* Number of second doses administered */,
  "third_dose_administered" INTEGER /* Number of third doses administered */,
  "booster_dose_administered" INTEGER /* Number of booster doses administered */,
  "fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of fully vaccinated people */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the demographic group */,
  "first_dose_uptake_per_1000" REAL /* Uptake rate of the first dose per 1000 people */,
  "second_dose_uptake_per_1000" REAL /* Uptake rate of the second dose per 1000 people */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Overall vaccination rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_stats_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_stats_dhb FOREIGN KEY ("dhb") REFERENCES district_health_boards ("dhb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_stats_vaccination_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_campaign_id") REFERENCES vaccination_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_stats_ethnic_group FOREIGN KEY ("ethnic_group") REFERENCES ethnic_groups ("ethnic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_stats_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_health_boards" (
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district health board */,
  "dhb_name" TEXT /* Name of the district health board */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the district health board operates */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the DHB */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the DHB */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the DHB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnic_groups" (
  "ethnic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnic group */,
  "ethnic_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the ethnic group */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional relevant information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the age group */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional relevant information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the gender */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional relevant information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the campaign */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination center */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district health board */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vaccination center */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the center */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the center */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of people the center can handle per day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_centers_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES district_health_boards ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the person vaccinated */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination center */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination campaign */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Dose number (1 or 2) */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination was administered */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the vaccine */,
  "administered_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the healthcare professional who administered the vaccine */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES vaccination_centers ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES vaccination_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "persons" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district health board */,
  "ethnic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnic group */,
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the person */,
  "consent_given" INTEGER /* Indicates if the person has given consent for their data to be used in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_persons_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES district_health_boards ("dhb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_persons_age_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_persons_ethnic_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnic_id") REFERENCES ethnic_groups ("ethnic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_persons_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_side_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each side effect record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination record */,
  "side_effect_description" TEXT /* Description of the side effect experienced */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the side effect */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who reported the side effect */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_side_effects_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES vaccination_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_follow_ups" (
  "follow_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the person vaccinated */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status after vaccination */,
  "follow_up_type" TEXT /* Type of follow-up */,
  "conducted_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the healthcare professional who conducted the follow-up */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_follow_ups_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id")
)
